description_long: This apartment building features a classic brick facade with ornate stone detailing above the upper windows, evoking early 20th-century urban architecture. The structure rises five stories, with the top floor set back and capped by a dark, steeply pitched mansard roof punctuated by dormer windows. The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, each framed by stone lintels and sills, and many have air conditioning units installed. The lower floors display large, arched windows, while the uppermost level features smaller, rectangular dormer windows. The building's exterior is primarily composed of reddish-brown brick, complemented by dark stone and black roofing materials. No balconies are visible, and the entrance is not clearly shown in these views.
description: A five-story brick apartment building with ornate stonework, arched windows, and a dark mansard roof with dormers. The facade is symmetrical and detailed, reflecting early 20th-century urban style.
description_view_0: The view shows the rear or side of the building, highlighting the dark mansard roof and symmetrical window arrangement without ornate pediments.
description_view_1: This view displays the front facade with prominent stone pediments above the dormer windows and detailed brickwork, emphasizing the building's main architectural features.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side or rear perspective focuses on the roof's shape and the regular window pattern, lacking the ornate front detailing.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, showing the front with decorative stonework, arched windows, and the distinctive mansard roof with dormers.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, with arched windows on the lower floors and smaller dormer windows on the top floor, evenly spaced and aligned.
